case_title: CARLOS MANUEL VEGA VS KAMAL KADRI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY CARLOS MANUEL VEGA AS TO DEFENDANT KAMAL KADRI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-1990 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARLOS MANUEL VEGA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAMAL KADRI $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $808.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KAMAL KADRI HEARING SET FOR FEB-09-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-09-1994, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-29-1990, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-23-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARLOS MANUEL VEGA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KAMAL KADRI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
